vocab.meaning: khả năng tiếp cận vô song
vocab.example: What makes this site my favorite is its unrivaled accessibility, allowing me to retrieve academic papers from anywhere in the world.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn/không gian lý tưởng dành cho
vocab.example: For a creative like me, Behance is a sanctuary for inspiration where I can admire top-tier graphic design work.
YouTube is a multifaceted platform that serves not only as an entertainment hub but also as a powerful educational tool.

vocab.meaning: sự tinh thông/năng lực công nghệ vượt trội
vocab.example: I am consistently impressed by the technological prowess of OpenAI's interface, which handles complex queries with ease.

vocab.meaning: nội dung chất lượng cao/độ trung thực cao
vocab.example: I gravitate towards photography websites that host high-fidelity content, showcasing every minute detail of the images.
I happened to stumble upon this niche cooking blog years ago, and it has since become my primary resource for exotic recipes.

vocab.meaning: được tích hợp một cách mượt mà
vocab.example: The website’s payment gateway is seamlessly integrated, ensuring a hassle-free shopping experience every time.

vocab.meaning: một tài sản/công cụ không thể thiếu
vocab.example: For anyone learning a new language, Duolingo is an indispensable asset that makes daily practice feel like a game.

vocab.meaning: khao khát sự kích thích về trí tuệ
vocab.example: Whenever I crave intellectual stimulation, I spend an hour browsing TED.com to listen to experts from various fields.
I’m quite fond of the website's minimalist aesthetic, as it eliminates unnecessary clutter and helps me focus on the text.
